reasoning: The informal statement asserts that any group G of order 1365 is not simple. The Lean theorem universally quantifies over types G with Group and Fintype instances, assumes card G = 1365, and concludes ¬ IsSimpleGroup G. Mathlib's IsSimpleGroup corresponds to the standard notion (nontrivial with only trivial normal subgroups); since |G| = 1365 > 1, the nontriviality condition is automatically consistent. The hypotheses and conclusion match the informal statement exactly.
